name: Zylo SaaS Management Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise SaaS management platform with REST API — discovering all SaaS applications in use via SSO, expense data, and network analysis, tracking license utilization and renewals, benchmarking software costs against market pricing, and optimizing SaaS spend through unused license reclamation and renewal negotiation insights.
use_cases: Querying discovered SaaS application inventory for IT asset management audits
Monitoring SaaS license utilization to identify unused seats for reclamation
Pulling renewal calendar and spend data for IT procurement planning
Integrating Zylo spend data with financial reporting for SaaS budget management
Benchmarking software costs against Zylo's market pricing database
not_for: Cloud IaaS cost optimization (use Vantage or CloudCheckr for AWS/Azure/GCP)
Software license compliance for on-premises software (use Flexera or Snow)
Individual productivity tools without enterprise IT management context
best_when: An enterprise IT or finance team wants visibility into all SaaS applications in use, license utilization, renewal forecasting, and spend benchmarking to optimize the SaaS portfolio and reduce waste.
avoid_when: You're a small company with a limited SaaS portfolio, need cloud IaaS cost management, or require on-premises software license compliance tracking.

auth.notes: API key from Zylo account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for renewal alerts and utilization threshold events. SSO integration (Okta, Azure AD) for application discovery. Expense integration (Concur, Expensify, NetSuite) for spend data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on employee count; contact sales
pricing.notes: Indianapolis-based company. Founded 2016. Raised $61M Series C (2021). Backed by Bessemer, High Alpha, Salesforce Ventures. Largest SaaS management category company. SaaS Intelligence Network with 30,000+ applications and market pricing benchmarks. Renewal intelligence with vendor negotiation insights. Strong in mid-market and enterprise IT teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for applications, licenses, renewals, and spend data. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. SSO and expense integrations configured in Zylo admin — not API-driven. SaaS discovery requires integration setup before data is available. Renewal calendar populated from contract data input.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Application reads fully idempotent. License reads idempotent. Spend reads idempotent by period. Renewal reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: SSO integration required for automated app discovery — manual catalog available
Expense integration (Concur/NetSuite) required for spend data accuracy
Renewal intelligence requires contract data entry — not automatically pulled
Market benchmarking uses Zylo network data — based on anonymized customer contracts
Annual contract — validate ROI before integration investment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. SaaS portfolio data and spend are sensitive — restrict API access. SSO integration requires identity provider OAuth — scope carefully. Expense data integration accesses financial records.
